# Gated QB Experience Experiment

*Generated by `sportslab qb-gated-experience` (v2.0.0, 2026-06-23)*

## Hypothesis

QB experience features (starts this season, starts diff) help when a QB change occurs, but add noise when applied to every game. Gating them by the QB-change binary flag may preserve the lift on QB-change games without damaging non-QB-change games.

## Model Variants

| Label | Features | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| incumbent | home_qb_changed, away_qb_changed, home_rolling_mov_3, away_rolling_mov_3 | Incumbent: qb_changed + rolling_mov_3 |
| qb_experience_global | home_qb_changed, away_qb_changed, home_qb_starts_this_season_pre, away_qb_starts_this_season_pre, qb_starts_diff, home_rolling_mov_3, away_rolling_mov_3 | QB experience global: qb_changed + starts + diff + rolling_mov_3 |
| qb_experience_gated_binary | home_qb_changed, away_qb_changed, gated_home_qb_starts, gated_away_qb_starts, gated_qb_starts_diff, home_rolling_mov_3, away_rolling_mov_3 | QB experience gated (binary): all starts gated by global QB-change flag |
| qb_experience_gated_team_specific | home_qb_changed, away_qb_changed, gated_home_qb_starts, gated_away_qb_starts, gated_qb_starts_diff, home_rolling_mov_3, away_rolling_mov_3 | QB experience gated (team): home starts * home_changed, away * away_changed |
| qb_experience_gated_simple_diff | home_qb_changed, away_qb_changed, gated_qb_starts_diff, home_rolling_mov_3, away_rolling_mov_3 | QB experience gated (diff only): only qb_starts_diff gated |

### Live-Safety Labels

All variants use `research_oracle` QB data (final actual starter from nflreadpy).
No variant is live-safe unless pregame QB input CSV is provided.

## Rolling Simulation (All Seasons)

| Model | Log Loss | Brier | Accuracy | Games | Δ vs Incumbent |
|-------|----------|-------|----------|-------|----------------|
| incumbent | 0.6487 | 0.2282 | 0.6329 | 1373 | — |
| qb_experience_global | 0.6459 | 0.2269 | 0.6315 | 1373 | -0.0028 |
| qb_experience_gated_binary | 0.6767 | 0.229 | 0.6293 | 1373 | +0.0280 |
| qb_experience_gated_team_specific | 0.6602 | 0.2305 | 0.6286 | 1373 | +0.0115 |
| qb_experience_gated_simple_diff | 0.6534 | 0.2291 | 0.6293 | 1373 | +0.0047 |

### Bootstrap CI vs Incumbent (Rolling, 1000 iterations)

Δ = challenger LL - incumbent LL. Negative Δ means challenger better.

| Challenger | Mean Δ | 95% CI Lower | 95% CI Upper |
|------------|--------|--------------|--------------|
| qb_experience_global | -0.0028 | -0.0115 | 0.0061 |
| qb_experience_gated_binary | 0.0282 | -0.0038 | 0.082 |
| qb_experience_gated_team_specific | 0.0114 | 0.0 | 0.0256 |
| qb_experience_gated_simple_diff | 0.0046 | -0.0036 | 0.0141 |

## Recommendation

**No model is promoted in this research pass.**

Best challenger on rolling: **qb_experience_global** (0.6459, Δ=-0.0028 [-0.0115, 0.0061]).
Best challenger on holdout: **qb_experience_gated_simple_diff** (0.6219).

1. **Does gating QB experience improve rolling all-season performance?** Yes.
2. **Does gating QB experience improve fitted-once 2025 performance?** Yes.
3. **Does any variant beat incumbent on BOTH rolling and holdout?** No.
4. **Does gating preserve the QB-change subset lift?** See QB-change subset table above.
5. **Does gating avoid damaging non-QB-change games?** See non-QB-change subset table above.
6. **Are coefficients stable enough to trust?** See coefficient diagnostics above.
7. **Should live predictions continue using no-QB fallback unless audited QB inputs are available?** Yes. All variants except incumbent use research_oracle QB data.

---
*Incumbent: v2.0.0, 0.6262 holdout LL. No model promoted in this pass.*
